sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Getty Images Plans to End Shutterstock Deal After U.K. Imposes Conditions
feed.summary: Getty Images announced its intention to terminate its merger agreement with Shutterstock. This decision comes after the U.K. Competition and Markets Authority stipulated that Shutterstock must divest its editorial business for the merger to proceed, a condition Getty Images' board found unacceptable under their current agreement. The termination is planned for July 6, casting significant doubt on the future of the proposed merger.

feed.title: Hub Group (NASDAQ:HUBG) lawsuit date lands before restatement filing
feed.summary: A class-action lawsuit against Hub Group (NASDAQ:HUBG) has a lead-plaintiff deadline of August 28, 2026, which precedes the company's projected September 14 deadline to file restated financials with Nasdaq. The lawsuit alleges misstatements regarding revenue recognition in 2023 and 2024, and understated transportation costs and accounts payable in 2025. Hub Group has indicated that an accounting error for 2025 financial statements, amounting to $77 million, will not impact cash flow, and previously disclosed that 2023 and 2024 financials also contain material misstatements.

feed.title: Needham Initiates CEVA (CEVA) With A Buy Rating
feed.summary: Needham has initiated coverage on CEVA, Inc. (NASDAQ: CEVA) with a Buy rating and a $55 price target, recognizing it as an attractive play in the emerging Physical AI sector. Despite widespread adoption of Physical AI being a couple of years away, Needham is bullish on the stock due to CEVA's strong market share in wireless connectivity and its raised full-year guidance after solid Q1 2026 earnings. The company, established in 1999, provides silicon and software IP for smart edge devices.

feed.title: Gold's Midyear Check-In: Debasement & Banks Remain Key
feed.summary: Sprott CFA Paul Wong projects continued strength for gold in the latter half of 2026, driven by factors such as ongoing debasement, monetary instability, and a decline in the petrodollar system. Investors can gain exposure through ETFs like the Sprott Gold Miners ETF (SGDM) and Sprott Junior Gold Miners ETF (SGDJ). These funds offer benefits like inflation protection and portfolio diversification, aligning with the current market interests of advisors.

feed.title: SmartRent (SMRT) CEO Martell exercises 450,000 RSUs and reports trust holdings
feed.summary: SmartRent, Inc. CEO Frank Martell exercised 450,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into Class A Common Stock on June 30, 2026, stemming from a CEO grant. To cover tax obligations, 223,110 shares were withheld, leaving him with 226,890 directly held shares. Martell also reported indirect ownership of 3,345,196 Class A Common Stock shares through a family trust.

feed.title: Iron Mountain Inc (IRM) Shares Fall 3.5% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: Iron Mountain Inc (IRM) shares experienced a 3.5% drop, closing at $121.90, which is 13.2% above its GF Value™ estimate of $107.69, indicating the stock is overvalued. The company has a strong GF Score™ of 85/100, driven by high growth and momentum, but its financial strength is low at 3/10. Additionally, insiders have sold $17.2 million worth of stock in the last three months, with no buying activity, signaling potential concerns about future performance.

feed.title: Con Ed preps for power outages during heat wave
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison has activated its Emergency Response Center to prepare for potential power outages and issues during an upcoming heat wave and thunderstorms. Crews will be working 24/7 to address both underground and overhead power problems. Customers can report outages and check restoration status online or by phone.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Trading 2.4% Higher - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) shares increased by 2.4% on Wednesday, reaching $521.4670 after securing approximately $38 billion in new defense contracts, including significant missile defense and radar awards. Despite this positive catalyst and a 2.6% dividend yield, analyst sentiment remains mixed with a consensus "Hold" rating, and UBS recently lowered its price target. The company also announced its Q2 2026 earnings call for July 23rd, with investors awaiting further guidance after missing Q1 earnings estimates.

feed.title: Costco to open another SoCal location – but some residents grumble its ‘not necessary’
feed.summary: The Downey City Council in Southern California has approved the development of a new Costco warehouse and gas station on Firestone Blvd., despite some local residents expressing concerns about its necessity given an existing Costco nearby. Mayor Pro Tem Horacio Ortiz Jr. supported the project, citing job creation and increased city revenue, but critics on social media highlighted the proximity of another Costco in Norwalk and suggested other retail options like Trader Joe's. While some found the new Costco unnecessary, others welcomed it due to the "horrendous" parking situation at the Norwalk location.

feed.title: Verisign CEO D. James Bidzos sells $828,110 in company stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Verisign CEO D. James Bidzos sold 3,300 shares of company stock worth $828,110 on June 30, 2026, across multiple transactions ranging from $248.98 to $252.50 per share. Following these sales, he directly holds over 426,000 shares. The stock is currently trading at $255.90, down nearly 12% over the past year, though it is considered slightly undervalued according to InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Trading Down 1.8% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) saw its shares decline by 1.8% on Wednesday, closing at $166.78 with above-average trading volume. Despite the drop, analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average target price of $187.63, following strong quarterly results that exceeded EPS and revenue expectations. However, notable insider selling by major shareholder Andreas Bechtolsheim and CEO Jayshree Ullal, through pre-arranged trading plans, coincides with significant institutional investment activity.

feed.title: Form 4 Centene Corp For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com announces a Form 4 filing for Centene Corp (CNC) for July 1st. It serves as a brief notice of the SEC filing for the healthcare enterprise.

feed.title: US Treasury picks BlackRock, Vanguard ETFs for Trump Accounts
feed.summary: The U.S. Treasury has selected two BlackRock exchange-traded funds, iShares Core S&P 500 ETF (IVV) and iShares Core S&P Total U.S. Stock Market ETF (ITOT), for the new "Trump Accounts" child savings program. Vanguard's Total Stock Market ETF (VTI) was named as an alternate fund partner. The program, launching July 4th, will provide $1,000 in seed money into investment accounts for children born between 2025 and 2028, with many corporations like BlackRock matching the government's contribution for their employees.

feed.title: Form 4 Hershey Co For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: Investing.com reports on a Form 4 filing for The Hershey Co, dated July 1st. The article provides the company's stock symbol (HSY) along with its current performance data and reiterates the filing date. It also includes comprehensive market data for various indices, commodities, bonds, and other stocks.

feed.title: [Form 4] MOLSON COORS BEVERAGE CO Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co (TAP) director Charles M. Herington reported an acquisition of 369 Class B share-equivalent deferred stock units. These units were granted as equity compensation in lieu of cash and vest upon his termination as a director, increasing his direct holdings to 65,930 Class B shares. The transaction, filed via Form 4, indicates a neutral filing impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Bank of America names Matile Khizeran as market executive for greater Sacramento region
feed.summary: Bank of America has appointed Matile Khizeran as the new market executive for its greater Sacramento region. This role encompasses Sacramento, Yolo, and Placer counties, extending south to Modesto in Stanislaus County. The announcement highlights a key leadership change within the bank's regional operations.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Unit Fails to Undo Wage and Hour Arbitration Loss
feed.summary: A California appeals court has upheld an arbitration award against a UnitedHealth Group Inc. subsidiary, Optum360 Services Inc. The former employee alleged that the company's requirement for workers to remain on premises during rest periods violated state wage and hour laws. The court ruled that requiring employees to stay on company property during rest periods constitutes illegal employer control, even if they are relieved of duties.

feed.title: Form 4 Kenvue Inc For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of a Form 4 for Kenvue Inc. on July 1st. It provides no further details about the content of the Form 4 but is surrounded by typical financial news and market data from Investing.com. The information is presented as a stock market update.

feed.title: Form 4 Freeport McMoRan Copper & Gold For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article provides details of a Form 4 filing for Freeport McMoRan Copper & Gold (FCX) on July 1. It cites Investing.com as the source and includes various market data and other news headlines. The core content is the announcement of the Form 4 filing for the specific date.

feed.title: Evernorth Invests $100M for AI Specialty Pharmacy Program
feed.summary: Evernorth, The Cigna Group's health services division, has committed $100 million through 2028 to its new AI-powered "Pharmacy Forward" program. This initiative aims to enhance specialty pharmacy operations and patient care by leveraging AI in areas like care enablement, experience accelerators, Rx readiness, and a unified fulfillment network. The program is initially launching with Accredo Specialty Pharmacy and is expected to generate $400 million in value by late 2028.

feed.title: What Does Textron’s (TXT) Index Exit Reveal About Its Evolving Investor Base And Liquidity Profile?
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (TXT) was removed from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index on June 27, 2026, which could impact institutional ownership and liquidity, though not fundamentally altering its near-term catalysts. The company's planned separation of its Industrial segment to focus on aerospace and defense is considered a more significant event for its trading profile. Investors should monitor how changes in institutional ownership interact with Textron's market risks and its projected financial growth.

feed.title: Webull: The Retail Trading Boom Is Back, But The Stock Still Has A Problem (NASDAQ:BULL)
feed.summary: Webull Corporation is rated Hold due to strong top-line growth but uncertain profitability and heavy reliance on cyclical trading activity. While Q1 saw significant revenue and customer asset growth, operating expenses led to negative EBITDA, and dilution and stock-based compensation remain concerns. The potential impact of the Pattern Day Trading rule removal on sustainable cash flow and earnings is still unproven.

feed.title: AIG sets August earnings date, then opens a live call next day
feed.summary: American International Group, Inc. (AIG) will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, August 6, 2026. The company will then host a conference call on Friday, August 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results. The press release, financial supplement, and live webcast will be available in the Investors section of AIG's website.

feed.title: Is SLB Ltd (SLB) a Bargain After 3.0% Drop? GF Value Says Underv
feed.summary: SLB Ltd (SLB) shares dropped 3.0% to $45.09, placing it 1.4% below its GF Value™ estimate of $45.75, suggesting it might be undervalued. Despite positive year-to-date and past-year performance, insiders have sold $5.9 million worth of shares, raising caution for potential investors. The company's GF Score™ of 81/100 indicates strong fundamentals, though its P/E ratio is above its 5-year median.

feed.title: Avis Budget Group - Enters Eleventh Amendment To Credit Agreement On June 29, 2026 - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Avis Budget Group has entered into an Eleventh Amendment to its Credit Agreement on June 29, 2026. This information was disclosed via an SEC Filing. The news was reported by Reuters.

feed.title: Molson Coors (NYSE: TAP) director granted 738 Class B shares as compensation
feed.summary: Christian P. Cocks, a director at Molson Coors Beverage Co (NYSE: TAP), received 738 Class B Common Stock shares on June 30, 2026, as stock-based compensation in lieu of cash. This transaction, reported via Form 4, resulted in him directly holding 10,016 Class B shares. The shares were granted at no purchase price, indicating compensation rather than a market purchase.

feed.summary: This article from Investing.com announces the filing of Form 4 for Domino's Pizza Inc. on July 1st. The article also provides general market data and related news not specific to the Domino's Pizza filing.

feed.title: Velocity Financial (NYSE: VEL) CLO buys 858 ESPP shares
feed.summary: Velocity Financial's Chief Legal Officer, Kelly Roland Thomas, acquired 858 shares of common stock through the company's employee stock purchase plan (ESPP) at $18.46 per share. This transaction, exempt under Rule 16b-3(c), increases Thomas's direct holdings to 99,852 common shares. The article details the transaction, provides definitions of key terms like ESPP and Rule 16b-3(c), and includes the full SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Badger Meter, Inc. Investors Have Until August 3rd to Contact Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Seeking Lead Plaintiff Role
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE:BMI) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between April 18, 2024, and April 16, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Badger Meter's financial results were misleadingly driven by pulling forward customer orders, concealing weakening demand. Investors have until August 3, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Janus Henderson Secures $2.9 Billion Term Loan and $500 Million Revolver to Support Take-Private
feed.summary: Janus Henderson completed financing for its take-private merger by securing a new senior secured credit agreement. This includes a $2.9 billion term loan and a $500 million revolving facility. Concurrently, the company terminated an undrawn $200 million unsecured revolver and extinguished an equity warrant, streamlining its post-merger capital structure.

feed.title: Janus Henderson Announced Transfer or Voluntary Withdrawal of Listing
feed.summary: Janus Henderson Group (JHG) has announced its intention to delist from the NYSE. The company notified the NYSE of a merger closing, requested a trading halt effective July 1, 2026, and will file Form 25 to remove its shares from listing and registration. Additionally, JHG plans to file Form 15 to suspend its SEC reporting obligations.

feed.title: Beta Bionics to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 29, 2026
feed.summary: Beta Bionics, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBNX) announced it will release its second quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, July 29, 2026. The company will host a conference call and webcast on the same day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time to discuss its performance. The webcast link will be available on the company's investor relations website.

It presents a detailed chronological list of documents spanning from Q1 FY2021 to projected Q1 FY2026, enabling informed investment decisions by offering insight into company performance and strategy.

feed.title: Orion S.A. (OEC) awards director 19,150 restricted shares
feed.summary: Orion S.A. director Paik Yi Hyon was granted 19,150 restricted common shares on June 26, 2026, as an award with a price of $0.00 per share. These shares will vest the day before Orion S.A.'s 2027 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. Following this transaction, Paik Yi Hyon directly owns 65,039 common shares of Orion S.A.

feed.title: Valmont Announces Timing of Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Valmont Industries, Inc. (NYSE: VMI) will release its second quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, July 23, 2026. The company will also host a conference call to discuss these results and its outlook for the balance of the year. Investors can access the live webcast or a replay through the company's website.

feed.title: Vicor Corp CEO Patrizio Vinciarelli sells $3.88m in company stock
feed.summary: Patrizio Vinciarelli, CEO of Vicor Corp, sold approximately $3.88 million worth of company stock through a pre-arranged trading plan. This sale involved over 10,000 shares at prices ranging from $322 to $364, following a significant surge in the stock price over the past year. The company recently reported strong Q1 2026 earnings and raised its Q2 revenue guidance, alongside a raised price target from Needham due to an optimistic long-term financial model.

feed.title: Innospec Publishes 2025 Sustainability Report Highlighting Measurable Progress and Responsible Growth
feed.summary: Innospec Inc. has released its 2025 Sustainability Report, demonstrating significant progress in environmental performance, safety, and responsible business practices. Key achievements include reductions in greenhouse gas emissions and employee accidents, increased investment in research and technology, and substantial contributions to social value and charitable initiatives. The report underscores Innospec's commitment to sustainable business growth and continuous improvement across its operations.

feed.title: Costco's newest Twin Cities warehouse opens next month in Otsego
feed.summary: The newest Costco warehouse in the Twin Cities will open in Otsego next month. This article announces the opening date for the new store, which is located in the northwest metro area. The opening continues Costco's expansion in the region, with previous plans for a location along I-94.

feed.title: RBC Initiates Centene (CNC) Coverage and Says the Worst of 2025 Is Firmly in the Rearview Mirror
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Ben Hendrix initiated coverage of Centene Corporation (NYSE:CNC) with a Sector Perform rating and a $70 price target. Hendrix noted that Centene is showing early signs of recovery in 2026 after a challenging 2025 marked by high medical costs and policy uncertainty. The analyst anticipates improving margins due to Medicaid reimbursement rate adjustments and favorable pricing changes in Centene's ACA exchange business, and potential for 2026 EPS to exceed guidance.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) director takes 327-share stock retainer grant
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) director John Joseph Stephens received 327 shares of common stock as an annual board retainer, valued at $62.89 per share. This was a compensation grant based on his prior election to receive stock instead of cash, not an open-market purchase. Following this transaction, Stephens directly holds 71,504 shares, indirectly holds 45,000 shares through a limited partnership, and beneficially owns 15,800 Restricted Stock Units.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX) director paid retainer partly in stock
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan director Hugh Grant received 536 shares of common stock at $62.89 per share as part of his annual board retainer fee, in lieu of cash. This transaction, categorized as a routine compensation-related acquisition, increased his total holdings to 49,850 shares, including 20,700 restricted stock units. The Form 4 filing details the grant and provides transparency on insider ownership, clarifying it was not an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Daniel Smith Acquires Shares of Simon Property G
feed.summary: Daniel Smith, a Director at Simon Property Group Inc (SPG), recently purchased 372 shares, increasing his total holdings to 34,480 shares. This transaction follows a pattern of 43 insider buys and only 1 insider sell for SPG over the past year. Despite the insider confidence, the stock is currently trading at $223.31, with a GF Value of $180.48, suggesting it is modestly overvalued.

feed.title: CACI Maintained by Jefferies -- Price Target Lowered to $510
feed.summary: Jefferies has maintained a 'Hold' rating for CACI International Inc (CACI) but lowered its price target from $550 to $510, indicating a cautious outlook. Despite this, GuruFocus assesses CACI as 12.9% undervalued with a strong GF Score™ of 90/100, driven by high profitability and growth ranks. Insiders have shown selling activity ($132,100) in the past three months, suggesting a careful approach to the stock's near-term performance.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) VP receives stock grant as 69 shares withheld
feed.summary: Brian James Pangburn, VP and principal accounting officer of Domino's Pizza (DPZ), received a stock award of 277 common shares as part of a restricted stock unit award. This award includes service-based vesting spread over three years beginning June 30, 2027. Concurrently, 69 shares were disposed of at $296.04 per share to fulfill tax obligations, a standard tax-withholding disposition, leaving Pangburn with a direct holding of 1,090 DPZ shares.

feed.title: ITW (NYSE: ITW) accounting chief reports common stock and RSU holdings
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) VP & Chief Accounting Officer, Matteo C. Pigozzo, has filed an initial ownership report revealing his holdings in common stock and restricted stock units (RSUs). He indirectly holds 1,097 shares and directly holds 3,669.412 shares of common stock, in addition to several RSU awards. These RSUs, granted in 2024, 2025, and 2026, are scheduled to vest fully between 2027 and 2029, with dividend equivalent units accruing until vesting.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) EVP reports 149-share tax withholding, holds 6,163 shares
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza EVP and Chief Marketing Officer, Katherine E. Trumbull, reported a tax-related disposition of 149 shares of common stock at $296.04 per share. This withholding was to cover tax obligations related to equity compensation and was not an open-market sale. After this transaction, Trumbull directly holds 6,163.579 shares and indirectly holds 85.256 shares through a 401(k) Savings Plan.

feed.title: A Look at ServiceNow Inc (NOW) After 6.6% Gain -- GF Value $229.
feed.summary: ServiceNow Inc (NOW) shares recently gained 6.6%, but at $105.80, the stock is considered significantly undervalued by GuruFocus's GF Value of $229.91. While the company exhibits strong fundamentals in financial strength and growth, recent insider selling and weak momentum suggest caution for investors. Its current P/E ratio is also notably lower than its 5-year median, further indicating potential undervaluation.

feed.title: Is It Too Late to Buy Moodys Corp (MCO) After 3.4% Rally? GF Value Says Undervalued
feed.summary: Moodys Corp (MCO) shares recently rallied 3.4% to $468.38, yet GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock remains undervalued with a 13.0% upside. The company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 91/100, driven by high profitability, growth, and valuation ratings, despite moderate financial strength and momentum. Notably, insider activity shows a significant amount of insider selling ($2.2 million) without any buying over the last three months, which investors should consider alongside the company's otherwise solid fundamentals.

feed.title: Chubb Ltd (CB) Stock Up 3.2% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 83/100
feed.summary: Chubb Ltd's (CB) stock rose 3.2% to $351.73, but GuruFocus's GF Value indicates it is 16.5% overvalued compared to its intrinsic value of $301.86. Despite a strong GF Score of 83/100, driven by an 8/10 growth rating, concerns are raised by a 5/10 financial strength rating and insider selling of $8.8 million in the last three months with no buying activity. Investors are advised to be cautious due to the overvaluation and insider selling trend.
